reviews.comment:
Estuvimos alojados 4 días con una delegación deportiva de 23 personas. La calidad de atención (estuvieron hasta el mas mínimo detalle), la comida y las instalaciones son de otro nivel!! Volveríamos mil veces más!!

(Translated by Google)
We stayed there for four days with a sports delegation of 23 people. The quality of service (even down to the smallest detail), the food, and the facilities are all top-notch! We would come back a thousand times over!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbWZMUy1nRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Good place to spend the night, have dinner and continue your journey
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSeHNiVU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Habitacion deplorable  con humedad y suciedad, la comida incomible, falta total de mantenimiento. Llegas cansada y te vas destruida.

(Translated by Google)
The room was deplorable, damp and dirty, the food inedible, and there was a complete lack of maintenance. You arrive tired and leave exhausted.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNG9YbGdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La habitacion sin aire acondicionado y con ventanas cerradas en un dia de muchisimo calor. La alfombra llena de piedritas. Cenamos en el hotel y nos pareció caro para lo que comimos.

(Translated by Google)
The room had no air conditioning and the windows were closed on a very hot day. The carpet was full of pebbles. We had dinner at the hotel and it seemed expensive for what we ate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoX19lbUdnEAE

reviewer.displayName: maria de los angeles grela regueiro

reviews.comment:
Malísima atención la empleada estaba pasando el trapo y me grito que no entre que espere que se seque y la otra me dice sino vaya a la otra estación disculpen para que ponen empleadas que no le gusta su trabajo?

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The employee was mopping and yelled at me not to come in, to wait for it to dry. The other one told me to go to the other station if I didn't like it. Excuse me, why do you hire employees who don't like their jobs?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocDRudlZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Hoy 19 de marzo del 2023 a las 11:23 quise entrar al kiosco a comprar y las dos chicas que estaban adentro nos gritaron de horrible manera! Que no entremos porque acababan de pasar el trapo! Nunca un porfavor ni nada, nos gritaron de todo y por qué si (a mí y a otras mujeres) cuando le dije que necesitaba comprar y seguir mi viaje me respondió una 'igual acá no hay nada, si no te gusta andate a otra estación' de una manera súper altanera y prepotente. Para colmo los baño estaba asquerosos super sucios, los papeles rebasados del tacho y mucho olor.
Una lastima porque los chicos de la playa fueron muy amables.
Revisen el personal de limpieza y kiosco.

(Translated by Google)
Today, March 19, 2023, at 11:23 AM, I wanted to go into the kiosk to buy something, and the two girls inside yelled at us horribly! They told us not to go in because they had just mopped! They never said "please" or anything; they yelled all sorts of things at us (and other women) for no reason. When I told them I needed to buy something and continue my trip, one of them replied, "Anyway, there's nothing here. If you don't like it, go to another station," in a super arrogant and overbearing way. To top it all off, the bathrooms were disgusting, filthy, the toilet paper was overflowing, and there was a terrible smell.

It's a shame because the staff on the beach were very friendly. Please review the cleaning and kiosk staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocDk2T2NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar de paso, sobre la ruta, comodo para salir. El lugar muy lindo pero sobre todo muy limpio y cuidado, y la atencion excelente!! Super recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop along the route, convenient for getting out. The place is very nice, but above all, very clean and well-maintained, and the service is excellent! Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNodzdQNkt3EAE
